(अ) 04 के 獧ारा भारत के राजप灴 灹कािशत 琈कए थे । उ猴 िनयम犘 के आंिशक संशोधन म犆, अनुसूची क琉 灙म सं榐या 7 के कालम 4 को “लेवल-11 (67100-208700/- 牱.)” के 瀡थान पर “लेवल-11 (67700-208700/- 牱.) ” पढ़ा जाए । [फा.सं. 4(1)/2010-र楹ा(एएफटीसी)] एम. सु瀑बारायन, संयु猴 सिचव MINISTRY OF DEFENCE CORRIGENDUM New Delhi, the 6th September, 2019 S.R.O. 13(E).—In the notification of Government of India, Ministry of Defence published in the Gazette of India vide S.R.O.(E) 04 dated 23rd April, 2018 regarding Armed Forces Tribunal (Group-A posts) Recruitment Rules, 2018. In the partial modification of the said rules, the Column No. 4 of Serial No. 7 of Schedule may be read as “Level-11 (Rs. 67700-208700)” instead of “Level-11 (Rs. 67100-208700)”. [F. No. 4(1)/2010-D(AFTC)] M. SUBBARAYAN, Jt.
